system.requirement: If you wield a dagger or knife…

abilities.description:
When you are in position to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} at an unsuspecting foe, choose one (before rolling).

  • Add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
  • Mark progress twice on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} someone at the point of your blade, or when you rely on your blade to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Siege}, add +1.

Once per fight, when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +shadow by performing a feint or misdirection, reroll any dice and take +1 momentum on a hit.
